description: Deepen iter15: max_depth 4 -> 5 chained on iter13 (n_est=200 family best). Single hyperparameter knob. Hypothesis: iter4 (depth=5 on n_est=100) showed std rise; with n_est=200 the per-tree contribution is smaller (lr same, more stages) so depth=5 may now be better-behaved. Closes the user-requested upper-budget iter11-15.
